title: Rupee falls 23 paise to cross 94 despite RBI intervention
content:
The Rupee depreciated by 23 paise.
*   It consequently crossed the 94-mark (presumably against the US Dollar).
*   This decline happened despite intervention efforts by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).

title: RBI purchased $7.4 billion in spot market in February, says bulletin
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) purchased $7.4 billion.
*   These transactions were conducted in the spot market.
*   The purchases took place in February, as confirmed by a bulletin.

title: Bihar Government seeks ₹12,000 crore loan from RBI to cover delayed social security pensions
content:
The Bihar Government is seeking a loan from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
*   The requested loan amount is ₹12,000 crore.
*   The purpose of the loan is to cover delayed social security pension payments.
